title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF INOYONAN HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY INOYONAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BULA. PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR TO FELIPE P. PANTON HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
115 OG No. 6, 1187 (February 11, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11172, January 03, 2019 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF INOYONAN HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY INOYONAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BULA. PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR TO FELIPE P. PANTON HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the

Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Inoyonan High School in Barangay Inoyonan. Municipality of Bula, Province of Camarines Sur is hereby changed to Felipe P. Panton High School.

SEC. 2. The main campus of the Felipe P. Panton High School shall continue to remain in its present location in Barangay Inoyonan, Municipality of Bula, Province of Camarines Sur.

SEC. 3. This Aft shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in any newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in die House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on July 31, 2018 and October 10, 2018, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: JAN 03 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
